recentTweets.text:
An overwhelmingly bipartisan bill to end daylight saving time passed the House yesterday.

@VernBuchanan’s legislation supports the law that the Texas Legislature passed last session to end this outdated practice of springing forward and falling back. https://t.co/j2vHDcdKl9
RT @HouseCommerce: Improving the quality of Medicaid care and lowering costs doesn’t have to be an either-or decision — we can have both.…

Republicans can improve Medicaid care while reducing costs. My Better Care, Better Cost Act would do both, saving taxpayers up to $9 billion a year.

Read more in my piece in @thehill ⬇️
https://t.co/IXSCkLc1Jz

Worth the watch. 250 years ago, the Founders established our great nation based on the rights, freedoms, and liberties endowed to all men. Since then, generations of Americans have fought and died to preserve those freedoms. 

There is far more that unites us than divides us. https://t.co/AwXv4KKtYl

One year ago, my @HouseGOP colleagues and I passed the Working Families Tax Cut. This historic bill delivered:

✅ No tax on tips
✅ No tax on overtime 
✅ Tax cuts for small businesses 
✅ Expanded the Child Tax Credit https://t.co/DVArKvQtbu

Gas prices are coming down. It’s simple, the greater supply of oil the lower the cost of gas. But gas prices will stay higher in blue states because of their costly gas taxes. 

My @HouseGOP colleagues and I will continue to unleash U.S. energy production and lower gas prices. https://t.co/naAuJYPJpG

RT @HouseCommerce: Texas remains a leader when it comes to technological innovation.  
 
As @RepCraigGoldman told Administrator @ArielleRot…

It was great to meet Chloe Christian from Arlington Heights High School and to honor her as the winner of this year’s Congressional Art Competition for TX-12!

Her artwork will hang in the U.S. Capitol, showcasing the incredible talent in our community. https://t.co/lQxQbcFB1H

Today in an overwhelmingly bipartisan vote my colleagues and I passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act.

This bill will help expand America’s housing supply by cutting red tape, streamlining programs, and empowering local banks to support the American Dream of homeownership. https://t.co/rV1ONOt6rY

Texas does it right. The Better Care, Better Cost Act would take a proven Texas policy and make it the national standard.

My bill could improve patient care while saving taxpayers up to $9 billion each year. https://t.co/uvkwJxlwSE

We want less war and more peace in the Middle East.

I’m grateful to my many colleagues who have joined me in advancing this goal through the Abraham Accords Expansion Act.
https://t.co/MrD08YFVLp

President Trump’s Abraham Accords expanded America’s leadership and countered the influence of our adversaries around the world.

I’m proud to author a bipartisan bill to help encourage more nations to join the Accords.
https://t.co/fqisRHz3yF

Today, my @HouseGOP colleagues and I voted to fund the Border Patrol and ICE. Every Democrat voted against providing the resources needed to secure our border, arrest dangerous illegal immigrants, combat fentanyl trafficking, and keep Americans safe. https://t.co/JvyMkQ8rxX

Waste, fraud, and abuse in Medicaid are costing taxpayers billions of dollars.

I’ll keep working to uncover and expose this massive waste so we can get federal government spending under control. https://t.co/Bb1HlNApOE

Great to join @POTUS, Kevin Hassett, @epaleezeldin, @ZachNunn, and @RepBice in the Oval Office today to support efforts to lower grocery prices.

Similar to my bill, H.J.Res. 75, these policies will repeal costly Biden-era rules that drive up food costs on Americans. https://t.co/kEkFdDvlDu

Major win today. The updated 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, led by @RepFrenchHill, passed with overwhelming bipartisan support.

My colleagues and I are working to implement @POTUS’ housing agenda and restore the American Dream of homeownership. https://t.co/z6ED9xZKfk

My team and I are here to serve you. If you need help resolving an issue with a federal agency, visit us at the Doss Heritage and Culture Center in Weatherford on May 27.

My team will be available in person to provide assistance. https://t.co/6WvahWI1XH

It’s remarkable what a difference an administration can make. The @WHFraudTF is uncovering massive waste, fraud, and abuse in taxpayer-funded Medicaid. We must end fraudulent spending and ensure Medicaid services go to Americans who truly need them.

Last week, I toured the tornado damage in Mineral Wells, and met with the Mineral Wells Economic Development Corporation and the Parker County Economic Development Council. Thank you to the Ventamatic and Parker teams for walking me through what remains of your businesses. https://t.co/o4R9LfARMm

Proud to join @RepArrington, @RepNateMoran, and all of my Texas GOP Caucus colleagues in affirming that states can and should defend their borders when the federal government pushes reckless open-border policies. https://t.co/9OM0R6eBNr

I’m honored to have joined @POTUS in the Oval Office for the signing of my bill, H.J. Res. 75, which lowers the cost of living for Americans by repealing some of the Biden administration’s costly regulations.
 
I will keep working to lower costs for Americans! https://t.co/CnJ9kMGC3o

My @HouseGOP colleagues and I will continue to unleash U.S. energy production and lower gas prices. https://t.co/naAuJYPJpG

The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.

I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window.
